medialive.channel.inputattachment.Automa.Docs: Settings to implement automatic input failover in this input.

medialive.channel.inputattachment.InputA.Docs: A name for the attachment. This is required if you want to use this input in an input switch action.

medialive.channel.inputattachment.InputI.Docs: The ID of the input to attach.

medialive.channel.inputattachment.InputS.Docs: Information about the content to extract from the input and about the general handling of the content.
